title: globulea capitata
intro: Globulea capitata, also known as the Globe-flower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Globulea capitata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce pain and inflammation, and act as an antiseptic agent to prevent infections. Globulea capitata is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and can be used topically to treat various health issues, including wounds, burns, and skin conditions.
